name: goldhunter-mcp
description: MCP server for GoldHunter — exposes POI, album, and guardian tools to Claude

tools.name: get_poi_context
tools.description: Fetch cultural context for a POI to feed the Guardian Cognitive challenge

tools.name: validate_presence
tools.description: Validate that a user is physically present at a POI location

tools.name: mint_fragment
tools.description: Trigger cNFT minting on Solana after a successful Guardian challenge

tools.name: get_album_status
tools.description: Get current completion status and remaining slots for a limited edition album
